news.title:
Force Motors' domestic sales rose 14.4% in March 2026 YoY.
Exports dropped 22.3%, but total sales grew 13.5% amid geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Force Motors' domestic sales rose 14.4% in March 2026 YoY.
Exports dropped 22.3%, but total sales grew 13.5% amid geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Force Motors & Godfrey Phillips to join F&O segment on April 1, enhancing liquidity.
SEBI's revised rules ensure only liquid, stable stocks qualify; circular on March 30 to detail lot sizes.
news.summary:
Force Motors & Godfrey Phillips to join F&O segment on April 1, enhancing liquidity.

news.title: Force Motors and Godfrey Phillips to be added to F&O list from April 1.

news.title:
Force Motors stock fell 9% intraday after SEBI sought financial details.
The stock is currently down over 3% from earlier levels.
news.summary:
Force Motors stock fell 9% intraday after SEBI sought financial details.

news.title:
Force Motors states SEBI seeks details on Q2 and H1 earnings ending Sep 2024.
SEBI also requests information on insiders and designated persons from Force Motors.
news.summary:

news.title:
SEBI seeks clarification from Force Motors on Dec 2023 results and Feb 2024 price movement.
No penalties or non-compliance identified; company to respond within timeline.
news.summary:
SEBI seeks clarification from Force Motors on Dec 2023 results and Feb 2024 price movement.
No penalties or non-compliance identified; company to respond within timeline.

news.title:
Force Motors reported Feb 2026 sales data; domestic sales rose 8.6% YoY.
Export sales declined 17.7% YoY; total sales rose 8.1% YoY to 3,890 units.
news.summary:
Force Motors reported Feb 2026 sales data; domestic sales rose 8.6% YoY.
Export sales declined 17.7% YoY; total sales rose 8.1% YoY to 3,890 units.

news.title:
Force Motors released Q3 and 9-month unaudited results ending Dec 2025.
Standalone and consolidated financials shared; investor presentation available online.

news.title:
Force Motors Ltd delivered over 230% returns in a year, outperforming Sensex's 7.97% growth.
Investors and analysts are evaluating the sustainability of Force Motors' growth momentum.

news.title:
Force Motors' board approved exploring acquisition of Veera Tanneries Pvt Ltd.
The acquisition aims to secure land for business expansion, with completion by Mar 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:
Force Motors' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹3.74B from ₹2.3B YoY, reflecting strong growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 17.6% from 12.3% YoY, indicating efficiency gains.
news.summary:
Force Motors' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹3.74B from ₹2.3B YoY, reflecting strong growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 17.6% from 12.3% YoY, indicating efficiency gains.

news.title:
Force Motors' Q3 PAT surged 252.1% YoY to Rs 406.1 cr.
Shares of Force Motors rose 3.4% to Rs 20,741.3 post-results.
news.summary:

news.title:
Force Motors' Board to review unaudited standalone and consolidated results for Q3 and 9M FY25-26 on 4 Feb 2026.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from 1 Jan to 6 Feb 2026 due to insider trading regulations.
news.summary:

news.title:
Kalyan Jewellers fell 14% to Rs 389.1, marking its 8th straight loss, down 32.6% in 6 months. SRF dropped 6.4% post strong Q3 results.
Coforge dipped 6% to Rs 1,593, while Force Motors and Ceat fell 6.6% and 5.6%, respectively, despite Force Motors' strong sales.
news.summary:
Kalyan Jewellers fell 14% to Rs 389.1, marking its 8th straight loss, down 32.6% in 6 months. SRF dropped 6.4% post strong Q3 results.
Coforge dipped 6% to Rs 1,593, while Force Motors and Ceat fell 6.6% and 5.6%, respectively, despite Force Motors' strong sales.

news.title:
Force Motors Ltd's quality grade upgraded to 'good' due to core business improvements.
With a Mojo Score of 84.0, it received a Strong Buy rating, reflecting robust financial health.
news.summary:

news.title:
Force Motors rose 1.15% to Rs 20,794.30 after a 49.7% YoY sales surge in Dec 2025.
Exports increased 88.2% to 96 units in Dec 2025, compared to 51 units last year.
